summary: Backend testing complete for Customer Number System (Kundennummer-System). All 18 tests passed. All 5 endpoints working correctly with BID-XXXXXX format.

my_customer_number.description: Returns authenticated user's customer number with auto-generation if missing

verified_values.auto_generation: Works - generates new number if user doesn't have one

lookup_customer.description: Public endpoint to verify customer number (returns masked name)

verified_values.name_masking: First char + asterisks + last char (e.g., K***e)

admin_credit_by_customer_number.description: Admin credits user's BidBlitz Pay wallet by customer number

admin_search_customer.description: Admin searches customers by customer_number, email, or name
admin_search_customer.verified: Searches by customer_number, email, and name all work

admin_wallet_topup_search.description: Admin wallet topup search with customer_number support
admin_wallet_topup_search.verified: Searches by customer_number, email, name, and id all work

critical_code_review_comments: Customer number format BID-XXXXXX (6 random digits) is correctly implemented
Auto-generation on first access via /my-customer-number works correctly
New users get customer_number assigned during registration (auth.py line 87)
Lookup endpoint is public (no auth required) - returns masked name for privacy
Admin credit endpoint creates transaction records in wallet_transactions collection
Search endpoints support customer_number in addition to email/name/id
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test customer BID-286446
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Number System fully tested. All 5 endpoints working: my-customer-number (with auto-generation), lookup (public, returns masked name), admin/credit-by-customer-number, admin/search-customer, and admin/wallet-topup/search. Test customer BID-286446 (kunde@bidblitz.ae) has balance €70.00. Admin customer number is BID-913853.
